title: White House wants to shift billions of dollars of research funding away from ‘slow consensus peer review’ and into individual scientists and AI
summary: Get full access to premium articles, exclusive features and a growing list of member rewards. The Trump administration has unveiled plans to shift around $200 billion dollars of research funding into individual scientists and a ‘national AI-for-science initiative’.
